title: The Shape of the Thing
executive_summary: Mollick argues we have crossed a threshold: the work dynamic has shifted from humans using AI as a tool to humans managing AI as an autonomous worker — systems now complete hours of complex professional work in minutes without step-by-step human direction

Benchmark data shows no plateau in AI capability growth: Google-Proof Q&A scores have reached 94% (vs a 34–70% human baseline), and the GDPval study now shows AI reaching or exceeding top human performance 82% of the time across professional tasks

The essay documents the emergence of 'Software Factories' — organisations like StrongDM where AI writes, tests, and ships production code without human involvement, each engineer allocated $1,000/day in AI token costs — as early evidence of radical organisational restructuring

Recursive self-improvement is no longer theoretical: Anthropic and OpenAI are already implementing feedback loops where AI systems help improve the next generation of AI, potentially steepening the capability curve further

Mollick's conclusion is not paralysis but urgency: uncertainty is not helplessness, and the choices organisations make right now — about structure, talent, and AI integration — will compound in ways that are very hard to reverse
the_one_insight: We have moved from the era of AI as tool to the era of AI as autonomous worker. The management question is no longer how to use AI — it is how to run an organisation where AI does the work and humans decide what work is worth doing.

key_quotes.text: This is an era of managing AIs, rather than working with them.
key_quotes.context: On the fundamental shift in how AI is integrated into professional work

key_quotes.text: uncertainty is not the same as helplessness
key_quotes.context: On how organisations should respond to rapid, unpredictable AI capability growth

key_quotes.text: the choices that individuals and organizations make right now matter more
key_quotes.context: On why the current moment — not some future inflection point — is the one that determines competitive position
